title: Don't judge a sheep by its wool
description: Leaves the sheep white when unsheared, but still colourful on top.
body:
![Changes: makes the face white, makes the wool of the torso white. Why the changes? More colour is great but (personally) the fully coloured sheep is too much.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0fee20f7ab4e7f78fbf68def538367ae5e081274.png)

This pack was made when the texture of sheep were changed to match with Bedrock edition.

# Terms of use
With this recourcepack, **_YOU MAY_** (only with proper credit):

- Include Don't judge a sheep by its wool in your modpack or server

- Modify for **personal** use

**_YOU MAY NOT_**:

- Redistribute this resource pack
